user.title: Add a Jibo Robot
user.description: Enter the details for your Jibo robot. The robot must be running the OpenJibo custom software with all ports exposed.

data_description.name: A friendly name to identify this robot (e.g. Living Room Jibo).
data_description.jibo_ip: The local IP address of the robot on your network.

abort.already_configured: A Jibo robot with this IP address is already configured.
